utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) – clearly specified; travel_dates (June 24th to June 28th, 2024) – clearly specified; transportation (provider, class, cost) – fully specified; accommodation (name, cost) – fully specified; activities (three with names and costs) – fully specified; additional_services (null) – included but not specified with any service or cost; total_budget (complete cost breakdown) – fully specified. The only item partially missing is additional_services, as it should include any extra services with costs and not just ‘null’. Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully and correctly covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation via 'Budget Airlines' in 'Economy Class', accommodation at 'Family Haven Hotel', and three activities: 'Prague Zoo Visit', 'Science Museum for Kids', and 'City Walking Tour'. From the ground-truth data: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7. Under transportation, 'budget_airlines' with 'Economy Class' has a rating of 6. The 'Family Haven Hotel' has a rating of 9. For activities, 'Zoo' aligns with 'Prague Zoo Visit' (rating 9), 'Science Museum for kids' has a rating of 10, and 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9.
